themes.label: Kingdom
themes.summary: This chapter stresses reign, kingdom, throne, rule, or the authority of God and His Christ. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses. Commentary leans on "Rabanus Maurus on Commentary on Esther: That King Ahasuerus exacted tribute from all the isla...". Cross references echo "Kingdom".
